comments.text: Listening to radio ads right now is like "Canadians are strong. Canadians are tough. Canadians never back down. Canadians deserve the best. That's why at Bob's Lube Garage, we know your tire lube should smell like poutine and Lake Erie fish,"

Just because it is Tuesday I will post a shot of the extremely rare "Aardvark Moon"! What I went out for was an image of a full moon rising with reflections on Lake Ontario. I wasn't expecting this. More details on Alt text #photography #EastCoastKin

Since Felon47 has taken it upon himself to call Canada the 51st state, renamed the Gulf of Mexico, talks of buying Greenland & taking over the Panama Canal with force, we have decided to rename the Great Lakes. We will follow suit with Denmark by telling the Orange Blob to f^ck off ❤️🇨🇦

But then the waves refused to dissipate. They pounded back and forth across the fjord again and again... The technical term for this is a SEICHE, pronounced “saysh” - a standing wave in a large body of water - and it can be dangerous as hell. (In 1844, one in Lake Erie killed 78 people.) 7/
I never get tired of this view. #Minnesota #LakeSuperior #landscape #PhotographersUnited
Here's your TGIF Yooper sunrise from the northwest corner of Lake Michigan. This is one of the most vivid sunrises we've had in a while up here. #PureMichigan

My hometown’s river is no longer flammable because of public policy! And our lake (Erie) was once considered dead and now it is slowly recovering, thanks largely to environmental regulations. Public policy works, pass it on.

It’s going to be well below 0F and 40mph winds this weekend, so it’s probably a good weekend for editing more of the photos from my last trip to the North Shore. Here’s another sunrise from that trip. #PhotographersUnited #photography #scape #landscape #sunrise #minnesota

This goes out to the Melissa & Mark Hortman and John & Yvette Hoffman families. Sending you love, peace and hopefully some tranquility in this sad time. Violence is never the answer, humans 🌊🌊

Why can't Minnesota, Wisconsin, Michigan and Illinois join Canada? I want all of the Great Lakes protected so we have clean water to drink.

Trump is going to try to invade Canada, starting with the takeover of the Great Lakes. Trump told Trudeau that "he did not believe that the treaty that demarcates the border between the two countries was valid" also wants to "revisit" "sharing of lakes and rivers between the two nations." #cdnpoli

This morning's sunrise over Lake Superior was wild. It's hard to describe how cool the colors were. I was just at the edge of the clouds looking west towards them. I have friends that live down the shore and they were under them. Their photos are wild!
We'll be getting more snow later today through tomorrow but for now I'm enjoying this fine Yooper Sunday sunrise from the northwestern corner of Lake Michigan. #PureMichigan

I'm a boatnerd. When 2008 happened, Great Lakes shipping all but ceased. I remember thinking, watch the boats. That'll tell you where we are. Well, here we are. Once again, shipping has all but creased.

Sometimes the best pictures come from me accidentally forgetting to change settings. These sunset reflections were captured at a leisurely 1/6th of a second which gave them a lovely feel of motion. June 7, 2025. Wolverine Lake, #Michigan. #sunset #reflections #photography #summer #abstract #art
